name: Link Apple
desc: You can reveal this card in your hand; banish (face-up) 1 random face-down card from your Extra Deck, then, Special Summon this card if the banished card was a Link Monster. Otherwise, discard this card, and if you do, draw 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Link Apple" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can reveal this card in your hand; banish (face-up) 1 random face-down card from your Extra Deck, then, Special Summon this card if the banished card was a Link Monster. Otherwise, discard this card, and if you do, draw 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Link Apple" once per turn.
eff: You can reveal this card in your hand; banish (face-up) 1 random face-down card from your Extra Deck, then, Special Summon this card if the banished card was a Link Monster. Otherwise, discard this card, and if you do, draw 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Link Apple" once per turn.

action: Reveals itself in the hand for cost
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
